title: reel:edit-marker args
description: Add / rename / remove a timeline marker (剪映式打点, editor reference anchor; never enters the final cut). op='add' needs ms (optional label; returns the marker id; adding within 1ms of an existing marker returns that one). op='rename' sets label by id. op='remove' deletes by id. ms is relative to scene start. Call reel:get-scene-timeline for ids.

label.description: Marker name. Used by add (optional) / rename (required).
